Headline: #87 87th Temporary Reroute at 87th/Rockwell
ShortDescription: 87 87th  buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, California, 83rd, Western and 87th: due to, street blockage near 87th/Rockwell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#87 87th  buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, California, 83rd, Western and 87th: due to, street blockage near 87th/Rockwell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #103 West 103rd Temporary Reroute near 103rd/Wallace
ShortDescription: 103 West 103rd buses temp. rerouted: due to, street blockage near 103rd/Wallace.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#103 West 103rd buses temp. rerouted: due to, street blockage near 103rd/Wallace.

Westbound buses will operate via 103rd, Normal, 102nd, Union and 103rd including the normal route streets at the beginning and end.

Eastbound buses will operate via 103rd, Union, 102nd, Parnell and 103rd.

Allow extra travel time.
